ogTitle: Darraweit Guim vs Dartmoor: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Darraweit Guim and Dartmoor.
heading: Darraweit Guim vs Dartmoor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Darraweit Guim, Victoria and Dartmoor, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Darraweit Guim has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Dartmoor (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Darraweit Guim or Dartmoor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Darraweit Guim has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Dartmoor scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Darraweit Guim scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Dartmoor scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Darraweit Guim or Dartmoor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Darraweit Guim has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
